rationale: The cited paper is used in a concrete methodological way: the authors explicitly say they follow Franses (2005) to run diagnostics (notably residual autocorrelation checks) before estimating their HB-ECM. This is tied to their model adequacy and specification choices, not just a generic literature list mention. Although it appears briefly, it informs how the empirical model is validated, so the citation plays a meaningful functional role.
relation_description: The citing paper applies methodological guidance from Franses (2005) on econometric diagnostics/model adequacy when preparing and specifying its ECM-based analysis. The role is practical implementation support rather than extending the cited paper's framework.
